violations.text: No person in charge (with a certificate of completion from an accredited food safety manager course) was present as needed at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 01/13/2026

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of biofilm. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice was voluntarily disposed of at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/13/2026

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Grilled chicken, fried chicken, and shaved steak was placed hot in the refrigerator in containers greater than four inches deep. Per PIC, all foods were made within 3 hours of inspection. Foods were moved to shallow pans and into the freezer to rapidly cool. Cooling methods reviewed with staff at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/13/2026

The non-food contact surfaces were observed with: 1) the cooking equipment in the fry station has an accumulation of grease. 2) the hood ventilation system has an accumulation of grease. 3) The fan covers in the 2 main walk-in refrigerators were observed with an accumulation of dust. New Violation. Correct By: 01/13/2026

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of biofilm. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch.PIC voluntarily disposed of ice. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/31/2023

Inpsector observed dead insects on fly glue traps in prep area. Insect control devices shall be installed so that devices are not located over a FOOD preparation: dead insects insect fragments are prevented from being impelled onto or falling on exposed FOOD or food equipment. New Violation. Correct By: 10/31/2023

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by droppings. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Establishment to increase PCS to biweekly services. PIC to provide inspector with proof of services. New Violation. Correct By: 10/31/2023

Wet wiping cloths are not stored in a chemical sanitizer between uses. Cloths in-use for wiping counters and other EQUIPMENT surfaces shall be held between uses in a chemical sanitizer solution at a proper concentration. New Violation. Correct By: 10/31/2023

The following non-food contact surfaces have an accumulation debris: 1.prep units and 1 dr refrigerator have food residue and other debris 2.oven hoods observed with grease and other debris. 3.shelves throughout kitchen and front counter area observed with food residue, debris, and rodent droppings. New Violation. Correct By: 10/31/2023
The outside dumpster is not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. New Violation. Correct By: 10/31/2023
Outdoor refuse area has an accumulation of litter, foliage, and other debris. Refuse areas must cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 10/31/2023

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the back outside area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 10/31/2023

The floors throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue, food debris, and /or rodent droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 10/31/2023
The walls in the warewashing and back kitchen area is in poor repair(observed holes). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 11/30/2023
